mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wallet_record (user_id, type, amount, balance_before, balance_after, business_type, business_id, transaction_no, remark) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{balanceBefore}, #{balanceAfter}, #{businessType}, #{businessId}, #{transactionNo}, #{remark})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wallet_record WHERE user_id = #{userId}
AND type = #{type}
SELECT wr.*, u.username FROM wallet_record wr LEFT JOIN user u ON wr.user_id = u.id WHERE wr.transaction_no = #{transactionNo}
